description: CASE expression with numeric column references preserves the column type

columns.name: adjusted
columns.note: both branches reference non-nullable integer column with ELSE clause

name: case_numeric_branches
query_sql:
-- @name GetAdjustedPrice
-- @returns :many
SELECT CASE WHEN price > 100 THEN price * 2 ELSE price END AS adjusted FROM products
schema_sql: CREATE TABLE products (id SERIAL PRIMARY KEY, name TEXT NOT NULL, price INTEGER NOT NULL, description TEXT, category TEXT NOT NULL)
